ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader (foreign key to users table) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (individual/team) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the resource in the project (e.g., PM, AM) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is currently available for projects */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Individual, Team) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the resource (e.g., Software Development, Marketing) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the resource */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resource (e.g., New York, London) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., IT, HR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the activity */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource related to the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature or module the permission pertains to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature or module */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
